root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.membership_no , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.approve_date, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_date , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_date ) as change_date_tdate , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_doc_no , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.entry_id , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.remark , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_status ,
sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ,
sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_group_name( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_refno ) ) as old_member_group_name , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_description , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_type , ( case trim(old_collateral_type) when '03' then 'เงินฝากค้ำประกัน' when '02' then 'หุ้นค้ำประกัน' else (trim( old_collateral_description )) end) as c_old_collateral_type, ( case trim(new_collateral_type) when '03' then 'เงินฝากค้ำประกัน' when '02' then 'หุ้นค้ำประกัน' else (trim( new_collateral_description )) end) as c_new_collateral_description, sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.old_collateral_amount , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_group_name( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_refno ) ) as new_member_group_name , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_description , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_type , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.new_collateral_amount , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.operate_type , sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.seq_no from sc_lon_m_coll_change_det , sc_lon_m_coll_change_head , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where ( sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_doc_no = sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.change_doc_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.operate_type in ('CG','DL') /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.approve_date between '01/01/2017' and '15/05/2017' order by sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_head.change_doc_no ,sc_lon_m_coll_change_det.seq_no
